name: Rough Notation
description: Animates hand-drawn SVG annotations on page elements — underlines, circles, highlights, brackets, strikethroughs. 3.8kb. Creates a trust-building hand-crafted feel.
head: <script src="https://unpkg.com/rough-notation/lib/rough-notation.iife.js"></script>
body:
<script>
(function() {
  if (typeof RoughNotation === 'undefined') return;
  var annotate = RoughNotation.annotate;
  var annotationGroup = RoughNotation.annotationGroup;

  // Highlight key price/stat elements
  var highlights = [];
  document.querySelectorAll('.rn-highlight').forEach(function(el) {
    highlights.push(annotate(el, { type: 'highlight', color: 'rgba(45,212,191,0.35)', animationDuration: 800 }));
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('.rn-circle').forEach(function(el) {
    highlights.push(annotate(el, { type: 'circle', color: '#5b4dff', strokeWidth: 2, animationDuration: 1000 }));
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('.rn-underline').forEach(function(el) {
    highlights.push(annotate(el, { type: 'underline', color: '#2dd4bf', strokeWidth: 2, animationDuration: 600 }));
  });

  if (highlights.length > 0 && window.IntersectionObserver) {
    var group = annotationGroup(highlights);
    var fired = false;
    new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
      if (entries[0].isIntersecting && !fired) {
        fired = true;
        group.show();
      }
    }, { threshold: 0.3 }).observe(document.querySelectorAll('.rn-highlight, .rn-circle, .rn-underline')[0]);
  }
})();
</script>
